meta.title: Privacy Policy for Mochii
meta.description: Learn how Mochii collects, uses, shares, and protects data, including AI processing by OpenRouter and Groq.

items.text: Privacy Policy for Mochii
Effective Date: March 3, 2026
Last Updated: March 31, 2026

blocks.text: Welcome to Mochii ("we," "our," or "us"). We are committed to protecting your privacy and being transparent about how we collect, use, process, and share your information. This Privacy Policy explains what data we collect, how we use it, when we share it, and the choices you have when you use the Mochii app (the "App").
By downloading or using Mochii, you agree to the practices described in this Privacy Policy. If you do not agree, please discontinue use of the App.
2.1 Information You Provide Directly
Account information: If you create an account, we collect your email address and any display name, profile details, or other information you choose to provide.
Chat content: We collect the messages, prompts, and other content you submit in conversations with your Mochii companion.
User preferences and settings: We collect settings, character configurations, personalization choices, and other preferences you choose within the App.
Support communications: If you contact us for support, we may collect the information you provide in your message, including your email address and any related details you choose to share.
2.2 Information Collected Automatically

Device and technical information: We may collect technical information such as device model, operating system version, app version, language, time zone, IP address, and app instance or device identifiers reasonably necessary to operate and secure the App.
Usage data: We may collect information about how you use the App, such as features you interact with, screens viewed, session duration, and general in-app activity.
Crash and performance logs: We may collect diagnostic, crash, and performance information to identify bugs, improve reliability, and maintain the App.
2.3 Information We Do Not Collect Unless You Choose to Provide or Enable It
We do not collect your real name, phone number, or physical address unless you voluntarily provide it.
We do not access your contacts, camera, microphone, or photos unless you explicitly grant permission for a specific feature.
We do not track your precise location.
We use the information we collect to:
provide, operate, and maintain the App;
create and personalize your Mochii companion experience;
remember your preferences and past interactions to make conversations more consistent;
process and generate AI responses you request;
improve the App's performance, quality, and features;
detect, prevent, and address abuse, fraud, security incidents, and technical issues;
respond to support requests and communicate with you about the service;
send important service-related notices, such as policy changes or security alerts; and
comply with applicable laws, regulations, and legal obligations.
We do not use your chat content to train our own AI models without your explicit opt-in consent.

sections.title: 4. AI Features and Third-Party AI Providers

blocks.text: To provide AI features in Mochii, we may send certain user-submitted data to third-party AI service providers that process data on our behalf and return AI-generated outputs to the App.
4.1 Third-Party AI Providers We Use
OpenRouter
Groq
4.2 What Data May Be Sent to Third-Party AI Providers
When you use AI features, we may send the following data to OpenRouter and/or Groq, to the extent necessary to generate a response:
chat messages, prompts, and conversation content you submit;
character or persona settings relevant to the conversation;
optional images, audio, or other content you choose to upload or submit;
limited account or session identifiers necessary to deliver the service, maintain continuity, or prevent abuse;
technical metadata reasonably necessary to operate the service, such as timestamps, request metadata, and error information.
4.3 Why This Data Is Sent
We send this data to OpenRouter and/or Groq solely to:
generate AI responses you request;
maintain and improve response delivery and service reliability;
protect the security and integrity of the service;
detect abuse, misuse, and fraud; and
comply with applicable legal obligations.
4.4 Your Consent
We ask for your permission in the App before sending personal data or user-submitted content to a third-party AI provider where required.
If you do not consent, AI features that depend on third-party AI processing may not be available.
You may also withdraw consent later in the App's settings, although this may limit or disable certain AI features.
4.5 Third-Party Provider Processing

OpenRouter and Groq process data according to their own terms, privacy practices, and retention policies, in addition to any contractual obligations they have with us. We require our service providers to protect data they process on our behalf and to use it only for providing services to us or as otherwise required by law.
We do not authorize third-party AI providers to use your content to train models for our benefit unless we clearly tell you and obtain any consent required.
We value your trust and do not sell your personal data.
We may share your information only in the following circumstances:
5.1 Service Providers

We may share information with trusted third-party vendors and service providers that help us operate the App, such as hosting providers, analytics providers, payment processors, customer support tools, and AI infrastructure providers, including OpenRouter and Groq. These providers may access information only as needed to perform services for us, subject to applicable law and contractual or technical restrictions.
5.2 Legal Compliance and Protection
We may disclose information if we believe disclosure is necessary to:
comply with applicable law, regulation, legal process, or government request;
enforce our terms or policies;
protect the rights, safety, security, or property of Mochii, our users, or others; or
detect, prevent, or address fraud, abuse, security, or technical issues.
5.3 Business Transfers

In the event of a merger, acquisition, financing, reorganization, bankruptcy, or sale of assets, your information may be transferred as part of that transaction. We will provide notice where required by law.
5.4 No Sale to Advertisers
We do not sell your personal data and do not share your personal data with advertisers for their own advertising purposes.

We retain your information only for as long as reasonably necessary for the purposes described in this Privacy Policy, including to provide the App, comply with legal obligations, resolve disputes, and enforce agreements.
Account data is retained while your account remains active and for a reasonable period thereafter as necessary for legitimate business or legal purposes.

Chat history may be retained to provide continuity of your experience and deleted or anonymized when you delete your account, subject to limited retention required for security, fraud prevention, legal compliance, or technical backup processes.
Diagnostic and analytics data may be retained for longer periods in aggregated or de-identified form.
Third-party AI providers may retain limited logs or records according to their own retention practices, operational needs, and legal obligations.
Depending on where you live, you may have the right to:
access the personal data we hold about you;
correct inaccurate or incomplete data;
delete your account and personal data;
withdraw consent for optional processing;
object to or restrict certain processing;
request export of your data, where available.
You may delete your account within the App through Settings > Account > Delete Account, where available.
To exercise any of your privacy rights, contact us at oneboardhq@outlook.com.
We take reasonable and industry-standard measures to protect your information, including:
encryption of data in transit using HTTPS/TLS;
access controls designed to limit internal access to personal data;
monitoring, logging, and safeguards intended to protect against unauthorized access, misuse, loss, or alteration; and
regular review of our security practices.
No method of transmission or storage is completely secure, and we cannot guarantee absolute security.

Mochii is not intended for children under 13, or the minimum age required in the user's jurisdiction. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children below the applicable minimum age. If we become aware that such information has been collected, we will take reasonable steps to delete it.
If you believe a child has provided personal information through Mochii, contact us at oneboardhq@outlook.com.

The App may integrate with third-party services, including payment processors, infrastructure providers, analytics tools, and AI providers. These third parties may have their own terms, privacy notices, and data handling practices. We encourage you to review their privacy policies where applicable.

If you are a California resident, you may have additional rights under applicable California privacy laws, including rights to know, access, delete, and correct certain personal information. We do not sell personal information.
To submit a privacy request, contact oneboardhq@outlook.com.

Mochii may process information in countries other than your own. These countries may have data protection laws that differ from those in your jurisdiction. Where required, we take appropriate steps to protect personal data transferred across borders.
By using the App, you understand that your information may be processed in countries outside your place of residence, subject to this Privacy Policy and applicable law.

We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. When we do, we will revise the "Last Updated" date above and, where appropriate, provide additional notice in the App or by other appropriate means.
If you have any questions, concerns, or requests related to this Privacy Policy, please contact:
Mochii Support
oneboardhq@outlook.com

items.text: Terms of Use
App Name: MochiiEffective Date: 3rd March 2026Last Updated: 3rd March 2026
1. Acceptance of Terms
By downloading, installing, or using the Mochii app ("App"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Use ("Terms"). If you do not agree to these Terms, do not use the App.

These Terms form a legally binding agreement between you and Mochii ("we," "our," or "us"). We reserve the right to update these Terms at any time. Continued use of the App after changes are posted constitutes your acceptance of the revised Terms.
2. Eligibility
You must be at least 18 years old to use Mochii. If you are under 18, you represent that your parent or legal guardian has reviewed and agreed to these Terms on your behalf.
By using the App, you confirm that:
You are legally capable of entering into a binding agreement
You are not located in a country subject to a U.S. government embargo or designated as a "terrorist supporting" country
You are not listed on any U.S. government prohibited or restricted party list
3. Account Registration
To access certain features, you may be required to create an account. You agree to:
Provide accurate, current, and complete information during registration
Keep your login credentials confidential and not share them with others
Notify us immediately at [Insert Support Email] if you suspect unauthorized access to your account
Be solely responsible for all activity that occurs under your account
We reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these Terms or that we determine, in our sole discretion, to be fraudulent or harmful.
4. Use of the App
4.1 License
We grant you a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable, revocable license to use Mochii for your personal, non-commercial use, subject to these Terms.
4.2 Acceptable Use
You agree to use the App only for lawful purposes. You must not:
Use the App to harass, threaten, or harm any person
Attempt to extract, reverse-engineer, decompile, or disassemble any part of the App
Use automated tools (bots, scrapers, crawlers) to access or interact with the App
Attempt to circumvent any security, access control, or rate-limiting measures
Impersonate any person, entity, or Mochii itself
Use the App for any commercial purpose without our prior written consent
Upload or transmit malware, viruses, or any malicious code
4.3 AI Interaction Guidelines
Mochii features AI-powered companions. You acknowledge that:

Conversations with Mochii companions are generated by artificial intelligence and do not constitute real human relationships, professional advice (medical, legal, financial, or otherwise), or guaranteed outcomes
You will not attempt to manipulate the AI to generate harmful, illegal, or abusive content
AI-generated responses may occasionally be inaccurate, incomplete, or unexpected — you use them at your own discretion
5. User-Generated Content

If the App allows you to submit or share content (e.g., profile information, character customizations, or messages), you retain ownership of that content. However, by submitting content, you grant us a worldwide, royalty-free, non-exclusive license to use, store, and display your content solely for the purpose of operating and improving the App.
You represent and warrant that any content you submit:
Does not infringe any third-party intellectual property rights
Does not contain illegal, defamatory, obscene, or harmful material
Complies with all applicable laws
We reserve the right to remove any content that violates these Terms without prior notice.
6. Subscriptions & In-App Purchases
6.1 Paid Features
Mochii may offer premium features through subscriptions or one-time in-app purchases ("IAP"), processed via Apple's App Store. All purchases are subject to Apple's payment terms.
6.2 Subscriptions
Subscriptions automatically renew unless cancelled at least 24 hours before the end of the current billing period
You can manage and cancel your subscription at any time through your Apple ID settings
No refunds are provided for the unused portion of a subscription period, except as required by applicable law
6.3 Price Changes
We reserve the right to change subscription prices. We will give you reasonable notice of any price changes. Continued use after a price change takes effect constitutes acceptance of the new price.
6.4 Refunds
All purchases are final and non-refundable unless required by law. For refund requests, please contact Apple Support directly, as all billing is handled through the App Store.
7. Intellectual Property
All content, features, design elements, trademarks, logos, and technology within the App are owned by or licensed to Mochii and are protected by applicable intellectual property laws.
You may not copy, reproduce, distribute, or create derivative works based on any part of the App without our prior written permission.
8. Privacy
Your use of the App is also governed by our Privacy Policy, which is incorporated into these Terms by reference. By using Mochii, you consent to the data practices described in our Privacy Policy.
9. Third-Party Services & Links

The App may contain links to or integrate with third-party services. We do not control these services and are not responsible for their content, privacy practices, or terms. Accessing third-party services is at your own risk.
10. Disclaimers
THE APP IS PROVIDED "AS IS" AND "AS AVAILABLE" WITHOUT WARRANTIES OF ANY KIND, EXPRESS OR IMPLIED. TO THE FULLEST EXTENT PERMITTED BY LAW, WE DISCLAIM ALL WARRANTIES, INCLUDING BUT NOT LIMITED TO:
FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE
ACCURACY OR RELIABILITY OF AI-GENERATED CONTENT
UNINTERRUPTED OR ERROR-FREE OPERATION
THAT THE APP WILL MEET YOUR EXPECTATIONS OR REQUIREMENTS

Mochii is an entertainment and companionship app. It is not a substitute for professional mental health support, medical advice, or crisis services. If you are in distress, please contact a qualified professional or a crisis helpline in your country.
11. Limitation of Liability

TO THE MAXIMUM EXTENT PERMITTED BY APPLICABLE LAW, MOCHII AND ITS OFFICERS, DIRECTORS, EMPLOYEES, AND AFFILIATES SHALL NOT BE LIABLE FOR ANY INDIRECT, INCIDENTAL, SPECIAL, CONSEQUENTIAL, OR PUNITIVE DAMAGES, INCLUDING LOSS OF DATA, LOSS OF PROFITS, OR EMOTIONAL HARM, ARISING FROM YOUR USE OF OR INABILITY TO USE THE APP.

OUR TOTAL LIABILITY TO YOU FOR ANY CLAIMS ARISING FROM THESE TERMS OR YOUR USE OF THE APP SHALL NOT EXCEED THE GREATER OF (A) THE AMOUNT YOU PAID TO US IN THE TWELVE MONTHS PRIOR TO THE CLAIM, OR (B) $10.00 USD.
12. Indemnification

You agree to defend, indemnify, and hold harmless Mochii and its affiliates from any claims, damages, losses, or expenses (including reasonable legal fees) arising out of or related to your use of the App, your violation of these Terms, or your violation of any third-party rights.
13. Termination
We reserve the right to suspend or permanently terminate your access to the App at any time, for any reason, including but not limited to violation of these Terms, without prior notice or liability.
Upon termination, your license to use the App ends immediately. Sections 7, 10, 11, 12, and 14 of these Terms survive termination.
You may stop using the App and delete your account at any time via Settings → Account → Delete Account.
14. Governing Law & Dispute Resolution
These Terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of [Insert State/Country], without regard to conflict of law principles.

Any disputes arising from these Terms or your use of the App will be resolved through binding arbitration in accordance with the rules of [Insert Arbitration Body, e.g., AAA or JAMS], rather than in court, except that either party may seek injunctive relief in court for intellectual property violations.
Class action waiver: You agree to resolve disputes with us on an individual basis and waive any right to participate in a class action lawsuit or class-wide arbitration.
15. Apple-Specific Terms
As the App is distributed via the Apple App Store, the following additional terms apply:
These Terms are between you and Mochii only, not Apple Inc.
Apple has no obligation to provide support or maintenance for the App
In the event of any conflict between these Terms and Apple's App Store Terms of Service, Apple's terms shall govern
Apple and its subsidiaries are third-party beneficiaries of these Terms and may enforce them against you
16. Changes to These Terms

We may revise these Terms at any time. We will notify you of material changes via in-app notice or email. The "Last Updated" date at the top of this page will always reflect the most recent revision. Your continued use of the App after changes are posted constitutes your acceptance.
17. Contact Us
If you have any questions about these Terms, please contact us:
Mochii Support📧 oneboardhq@outlook.com

meta.title: EULA - mochii
meta.description: Chat with AI characters on mochii — your cozy space for immersive, personalized conversations with unique AI personas. Start chatting for free today.

items.text: End User License Agreement (EULA)
App Name: MochiiEffective Date: 3rd March 2026Last Updated: 3rd March 2026
1. Agreement to Terms

This End User License Agreement ("EULA") is a legally binding agreement between you ("User" or "you") and Mochii ("Licensor," "we," "our," or "us") governing your use of the Mochii mobile application ("App"), including any updates, upgrades, or supplemental services provided in connection with it.
By downloading, installing, or using the App, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by this EULA. If you do not agree, do not download or use the App.
This EULA is entered into between you and Mochii only — notwith Apple Inc. Apple is not a party to this EULA and is not responsible for the App or its content.
2. License Grant
Subject to your compliance with this EULA, Mochii grants you a limited, personal, non-exclusive, non-transferable, non-sublicensable, revocable license to:
Download and install one copy of the App on any Apple-branded device that you own or control
Use the App solely for your personal, non-commercial purposes
Access and use any content or features made available within the App, subject to any applicable subscription or purchase requirements
This license does not include the right to use the App on any device you do not own or control, or to make the App available over a network where it could be used by multiple devices simultaneously.
3. License Restrictions
You may not, and you may not permit or enable any third party to:
Copy, reproduce, modify, or create derivative works of the App or any part thereof
Reverse engineer, disassemble, decompile, decode, or attempt to derive the source code of the App
Remove, alter, or obscure any proprietary notices, labels, or markings on the App
Rent, lease, lend, sell, sublicense, assign, distribute, or otherwise transfer the App or this EULA to any third party
Use the App for any commercial purpose, public display, or in any manner not expressly permitted by this EULA
Use the App in any way that violates applicable local, national, or international laws or regulations
Use the App to develop a competing product or service
4. Intellectual Property Ownership

The App, including all content, features, graphics, user interface elements, code, and underlying technology, is owned by Mochii or its licensors and is protected by copyright, trademark, patent, trade secret, and other intellectual property laws.

This EULA does not transfer any ownership rights to you. You acknowledge that no title to the intellectual property in the App is transferred to you, and that you obtain only the limited usage rights expressly set forth in this EULA.
All rights not expressly granted herein are reserved by Mochii.
5. AI-Generated Content
The App uses artificial intelligence to generate companion interactions and conversational content. You acknowledge and agree that:
All AI-generated characters, personas, dialogue, and content within the App are the intellectual property of Mochii
You may not reproduce, publish, or distribute AI-generated content from the App outside of personal, non-commercial use
AI-generated content is provided for entertainment purposes only and does not constitute professional, medical, psychological, legal, or financial advice
Mochii makes no representations or warranties about the accuracy, appropriateness, or completeness of AI-generated content
6. Updates & Maintenance

Mochii may, at its sole discretion, release updates, patches, or new versions of the App. Such updates may be required to continue using the App and may be delivered automatically. This EULA applies to all such updates unless a separate agreement accompanies them.
Apple has no obligation whatsoever to provide any maintenance or support services for the App.
7. Subscriptions & In-App Purchases
Certain features of the App may require payment via subscription or one-time in-app purchase, processed exclusively through Apple's App Store and governed by Apple's payment terms.
All fees are non-refundable except as required by applicable law or Apple's refund policy
Subscriptions automatically renew unless cancelled at least 24 hours before the renewal date via your Apple ID settings
You are solely responsible for managing and cancelling your subscriptions
8. Collection and Use of Data
Your use of the App is subject to Mochii's Privacy Policy, available within the App. By using the App, you consent to the collection and use of data as described therein.
9. Third-Party Materials

The App may include or rely upon third-party software, libraries, or services. Any such third-party components are subject to their own license terms, and your use of the App constitutes acceptance of those terms where applicable. Mochii makes no warranties regarding any third-party materials.
10. Disclaimer of Warranties

THE APP IS PROVIDED TO YOU "AS IS" AND "AS AVAILABLE," WITH ALL FAULTS AND WITHOUT WARRANTY OF ANY KIND. TO THE MAXIMUM EXTENT PERMITTED BY APPLICABLE LAW, MOCHII EXPRESSLY DISCLAIMS ALL WARRANTIES, WHETHER EXPRESS, IMPLIED, OR STATUTORY, INCLUDING BUT NOT LIMITED TO:
IMPLIED WARRANTIES OF MERCHANTABILITY, FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE, AND NON-INFRINGEMENT
WARRANTIES THAT THE APP WILL MEET YOUR REQUIREMENTS OR EXPECTATIONS
WARRANTIES THAT OPERATION OF THE APP WILL BE UNINTERRUPTED, TIMELY, SECURE, OR ERROR-FREE
WARRANTIES AS TO THE ACCURACY OR RELIABILITY OF ANY CONTENT OBTAINED THROUGH THE APP
NO ORAL OR WRITTEN INFORMATION OR ADVICE GIVEN BY MOCHII OR ITS REPRESENTATIVES SHALL CREATE ANY WARRANTY NOT EXPRESSLY STATED IN THIS EULA.
11. Limitation of Liability
TO THE FULLEST EXTENT PERMITTED BY APPLICABLE LAW, IN NO EVENT SHALL MOCHII, ITS OFFICERS, DIRECTORS, EMPLOYEES, AGENTS, OR LICENSORS BE LIABLE FOR:
ANY INDIRECT, INCIDENTAL, SPECIAL, CONSEQUENTIAL, EXEMPLARY, OR PUNITIVE DAMAGES
LOSS OF PROFITS, REVENUE, DATA, GOODWILL, OR OTHER INTANGIBLE LOSSES
DAMAGES RESULTING FROM UNAUTHORIZED ACCESS TO OR ALTERATION OF YOUR DATA
ANY MATTER BEYOND MOCHII'S REASONABLE CONTROL
WHETHER BASED ON WARRANTY, CONTRACT, TORT (INCLUDING NEGLIGENCE), STATUTE, OR ANY OTHER LEGAL THEORY, EVEN IF MOCHII HAS BEEN ADVISED OF THE POSSIBILITY OF SUCH DAMAGES.

MOCHII'S TOTAL CUMULATIVE LIABILITY TO YOU FOR ALL CLAIMS UNDER THIS EULA SHALL NOT EXCEED THE GREATER OF (A) THE FEES YOU PAID FOR THE APP IN THE TWELVE MONTHS PRECEDING THE CLAIM, OR (B) $10.00 USD.
12. Indemnification

You agree to indemnify, defend, and hold harmless Mochii and its affiliates, officers, directors, employees, agents, and licensors from and against any and all claims, liabilities, damages, losses, costs, and expenses (including reasonable attorneys' fees) arising out of or relating to:
Your use of or inability to use the App
Your violation of this EULA
Your violation of any applicable law or regulation
Your infringement of any third-party rights
13. Term & Termination
This EULA is effective from the date you first download or use the App and remains in effect until terminated.
Termination by you: You may terminate this EULA at any time by deleting the App and your account from all devices.
Termination by Mochii: We may terminate this EULA and your access to the App immediately and without notice if you breach any provision of this EULA or our Terms of Use.

Any disputes not subject to arbitration under the Terms of Use shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts located in [Insert Jurisdiction].
16. Apple as Third-Party Beneficiary

You acknowledge and agree that Apple Inc. and its subsidiaries are third-party beneficiaries of this EULA. Upon your acceptance of this EULA, Apple will have the right (and is deemed to have accepted the right) to enforce this EULA against you as a third-party beneficiary.

17. Severability

If any provision of this EULA is found to be invalid, illegal, or unenforceable, the remaining provisions shall continue in full force and effect. The invalid provision shall be modified to the minimum extent necessary to make it enforceable.
18. Entire Agreement

This EULA, together with the Mochii Terms of Use and Privacy Policy, constitutes the entire agreement between you and Mochii with respect to the App and supersedes all prior or contemporaneous understandings, representations, or agreements relating to its subject matter.

blocks.text: This End User License Agreement ("EULA") is a legally binding agreement between you ("User" or "you") and Mochii ("Licensor," "we," "our," or "us") governing your use of the Mochii mobile application ("App"), including any updates, upgrades, or supplemental services provided in connection with it.

The App may include or rely upon third-party software, libraries, or services. Any such third-party components are subject to their own license terms, and your use of the App constitutes acceptance of those terms where applicable. Mochii makes no warranties regarding any third-party materials.

THE APP IS PROVIDED TO YOU "AS IS" AND "AS AVAILABLE," WITH ALL FAULTS AND WITHOUT WARRANTY OF ANY KIND. TO THE MAXIMUM EXTENT PERMITTED BY APPLICABLE LAW, MOCHII EXPRESSLY DISCLAIMS ALL WARRANTIES, WHETHER EXPRESS, IMPLIED, OR STATUTORY, INCLUDING BUT NOT LIMITED TO:

ANY MATTER BEYOND MOCHII'S REASONABLE CONTROL
WHETHER BASED ON WARRANTY, CONTRACT, TORT (INCLUDING NEGLIGENCE), STATUTE, OR ANY OTHER LEGAL THEORY, EVEN IF MOCHII HAS BEEN ADVISED OF THE POSSIBILITY OF SUCH DAMAGES.
